edges.evidence_quote: the gang is an exclusively indigenous Canadian organization that was established on the Lake Manitoba First Nation in 1993 to rival the Indian Posse gang.
edges.context: Manitoba Warriors were founded to rival Indian Posse.

edges.evidence_quote: CISC asserts that the gang... also supports and facilitates criminal activities for the Hells Angels motorcycle gang
edges.context: Manitoba Warriors support and facilitate criminal activities for Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: the need for allies led to the Warriors to absorb the Overlords gang into their ranks
edges.context: Manitoba Warriors absorbed the Overlords gang.

edges.evidence_quote: form an alliance with los Bravos biker gang
edges.context: Manitoba Warriors formed an alliance with los Bravos.

edges.evidence_quote: Saskatchewan Warriors, Alberta Warriors, CENTRAL, Loyalty Honour Silence and MOB Squad are some of their more well known affiliations.
edges.context: CENTRAL is an affiliated organization of Manitoba Warriors.

edges.evidence_quote: CISC asserts that the gang, in addition to engaging in marijuana cultivation, auto theft, illegal firearms activities, gambling, and drug trafficking, also supports and facilitates criminal activities for the Hells Angels motorcycle gang and Asian-based networks.
edges.context: Manitoba Warriors supports and facilitates criminal activities for Hells Angels.
